overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing protagonist Geralt traversing a grassy mountainous landscape. The character engages in brief combat with an enemy near tree stumps before running through open fields past a wooden fortification, continuing along a grassy trail with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered tree stumps

events.description: engages in melee combat with approaching enemy bandit near tree stump
defeats enemy and transitions from combat stance to running away

agents.ego_description: draws weapon and fights the approaching enemy, then sheathes and runs away from the combat area

notable_agents.action: enemy bandit approaches with weapon drawn and attacks the protagonist

mountain range with snow visible on peaks in the background
dense coniferous trees covering distant hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the protagonist standing near a tree stump in a grassy field with snow-capped mountains in the distance. An enemy bandit approaches from the center and engages in brief melee combat. After defeating the enemy, the character sheathes their weapon and begins running away from the combat area toward open grassland.

agents.ego_description: running steadily through tall grass toward a wooden structure with smoke rising

entered.detail: dark wooden palisade wall with smoke rising from behind
white smoke rising vertically from the wooden structure

segments.scene_description: The character runs through open grassland with scattered pine trees, approaching a wooden fortification with smoke rising from it. The camera passes the wooden structure on the left side, revealing more of the snow-capped mountain range ahead as the character continues moving forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested grassland with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy terrain toward distant mountains and ruins

entered.detail: stone tower ruins visible on distant hillside

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to walking through expansive grassland with scattered pine trees and boulders. Distant castle ruins become visible on the left hillside while the snow-capped mountain peak remains centered in the background. The terrain features rolling hills covered in tall grass and wildflowers as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brief skirmish in a grassy field toward an expansive, mountainous wilderness. It begins with the protagonist engaging a bandit in melee combat near a tree stump, before the character sheathes their weapon and breaks into a run across the open grassland. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts past a smoking wooden fortification on the left, which opens up the view toward a towering range of snow-capped mountains. The camera then transitions from a run to a steady walk through rolling hills of tall grass and wildflowers, passing scattered pine trees and boulders. Finally, the landscape expands further to reveal distant castle ruins on a hillside while the central mountain peak remains fixed on the horizon.
